title: pyrus halleana
intro: Pyrus halleana is a plant species in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the mountain ash. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, and its bark, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus halleana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and sore throats. In herbal preparations, Pyrus halleana is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
